scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run sitemap:generate && npm run redirects:generate && npm run routes:generate && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run prerender --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace backend
